scope: safe audit-first refactor for KISS PM SaaS/self-hosted foundation

notes: phase2-2-users-crud.png is untracked and was not touched.
User-requested legacy English source-of-truth paths are absent; current Russian canonical docs from docs/README.md were used.

blocks.problem: The task referenced old English canonical document paths that no longer exist after docs-first restart.
tests_before: Get-Content docs/README.md and current Russian canonical docs
tests_after: Documented as source-of-truth path drift; no runtime checks required
blocks.notes: Use current Russian canonical docs as source of truth; do not recreate old filenames unless a docs decision asks for compatibility aliases.

blocks.problem: Workspace config constraints are duplicated in API parsers and web form validation instead of living in the domain boundary.
blocks.notes: Completed in this batch. Domain now owns normalized validators and raw-input compatibility helpers; API error codes and Russian UI messages stayed unchanged.

blocks.problem: App.tsx was a god file; after the completed slices it is a thin client entrypoint and shell orchestration is split into reusable layout, routing and data modules.
tests_before: apps/web/src/repositoryHealth.test.ts now limits App.tsx to 100 lines and WorkspaceShell.tsx to 500 lines
tests_after: component or route-level characterization tests before extraction
blocks.notes: Closed after review through REF-003A..REF-003K. App.tsx is below the 500-line target; WorkspaceShell.tsx is below the 500-line follow-up budget and delegates reusable sidebar, topbar, route rendering and data orchestration.

blocks.problem: Dashboard presentation lived inside App.tsx and kept the shell god-file above the current guardrail.
blocks.notes: DashboardView extracted as a presentation component; App.tsx line budget tightened from 2800 to 2600. Next slices should use Next App Router page/view boundaries where possible.

blocks.problem: Users CRUD view, form state, modal state and user mutations lived inside App.tsx.
blocks.notes: UsersView extracted without changing route ids, permissions, mutation calls or modal behavior. App.tsx line budget tightened from 2600 to 2200.

blocks.problem: Access roles CRUD view, permission matrix form and access role mutations lived inside App.tsx.
blocks.notes: RolesView extracted without changing route ids, permission gating, disabled-state reasons or mutation calls. App.tsx line budget tightened from 2200 to 1900.

blocks.problem: Positions CRUD view, form state and position mutations lived inside App.tsx.
blocks.notes: PositionsView extracted without changing route ids, permission gating, disabled-state reasons or mutation calls. App.tsx line budget tightened from 1900 to 1600.

blocks.problem: Audit table rendering lived inside App.tsx.
blocks.notes: AuditView extracted without changing audit preview formatting, route ids or permission gating. App.tsx line budget tightened from 1600 to 1450.

blocks.problem: Profile and theme forms lived inside App.tsx.
blocks.notes: ProfileView and ThemeView extracted without changing mutation calls, permission gating or form markup. App.tsx line budget tightened from 1450 to 1300.

blocks.problem: Workspace settings custom fields/templates CRUD view lived inside App.tsx.
blocks.notes: WorkspaceSettingsView extracted without changing custom field/template mutation calls, permission gating or form markup. App.tsx line budget tightened from 1300 to 700.

blocks.problem: App.tsx still owned authenticated workspace shell orchestration after route views were extracted.
blocks.notes: WorkspaceShell extracted. App.tsx is now a 7-line client entrypoint; repository health guards App.tsx at 100 lines.

blocks.problem: WorkspaceShell still owned navigation drawer, topbar, route rendering and authenticated data orchestration after App.tsx was thinned.
blocks.notes: WorkspaceSidebar, WorkspaceTopbar, WorkspaceRouteRenderer and useWorkspaceShellData extracted. WorkspaceShell is now 415 lines and guarded by a 500-line budget.

blocks.problem: App.tsx owned pure permission checks, section loading/error state, metric hints and API error message mapping, making shell behavior harder to test outside the god-file.
tests_before: pnpm vitest run apps/web/src/workspaceShellState.test.ts apps/web/src/routes.test.ts apps/web/src/repositoryHealth.test.ts failed because workspaceShellState did not exist
tests_after: pnpm vitest run apps/web/src/workspaceShellState.test.ts apps/web/src/routes.test.ts apps/web/src/repositoryHealth.test.ts
blocks.notes: SectionState moved to a neutral shell-state module; workspace-ui imports only its type. API error messages and permission checks are covered by characterization tests.

blocks.problem: App.tsx owned route icon metadata that belongs with shell route metadata rather than the main application component.
tests_before: pnpm vitest run apps/web/src/workspaceRouteIcons.test.ts apps/web/src/routes.test.ts failed because workspaceRouteIcons did not exist
tests_after: pnpm vitest run apps/web/src/workspaceRouteIcons.test.ts apps/web/src/routes.test.ts apps/web/src/repositoryHealth.test.ts
blocks.notes: Route icon registry now has coverage for every stable workspace route id. Test adjusted after verifying lucide icons can be React component objects, not only functions.

blocks.problem: API app file is still large and combines route wiring, auth/session behavior, workspace operations and audit concerns.
blocks.notes: Closed through REF-004A app error mapping and REF-004B route-group extraction. apps/api/src/app.ts is now a composition entrypoint under the 500-line guardrail.

blocks.problem: app.ts owned fail-closed application error mapping alongside route wiring.
tests_before: pnpm vitest run apps/api/src/appErrors.test.ts apps/api/src/app.test.ts failed because appErrors did not exist
blocks.notes: MissingAccessProfileError and resolveAppErrorResponse now live outside app.ts; Hono onError remains a thin adapter.

blocks.problem: apps/api/src/app.ts still owned endpoint bodies for auth, dev tenant routes, access roles, audit, workspace users, positions and profile/theme after the first error-boundary split.
tests_before: pnpm vitest run apps/web/src/repositoryHealth.test.ts apps/web/src/shadcnFoundation.test.ts apps/api/src/app.test.ts failed because apps/api/src/app.ts had 1302 lines and the new budget is 500
tests_after: pnpm vitest run apps/web/src/repositoryHealth.test.ts apps/web/src/shadcnFoundation.test.ts apps/api/src/app.test.ts
blocks.notes: Route paths, auth cookie flow, permission checks, API error codes and audit payloads stayed unchanged; app.ts is 186 lines after extraction.

blocks.problem: Repository layer is a broad persistence surface; tenant, user, profile, workspace config and audit operations are coupled in one file.
blocks.notes: Closed for this refactor plan through REF-005A repository row mappers and REF-005B workspace config repository area. Further repository splitting should wait for a concrete business feature or proven risk.

blocks.problem: repositories.ts owned pure row-to-domain mappers and permission coercion alongside SQL query methods.
tests_before: pnpm vitest run packages/persistence/src/repositoryMappers.test.ts packages/persistence/src/repositories.db.test.ts failed because repositoryMappers did not exist
blocks.notes: Pure mappers and toPermission moved to repositoryMappers; repository SQL and public datasource API stayed unchanged.

blocks.problem: packages/persistence/src/repositories.ts still owned workspace config SQL for custom fields and project templates after pure row mappers were extracted.
tests_before: pnpm vitest run apps/web/src/repositoryHealth.test.ts failed because packages/persistence/src/repositories.ts had 627 lines and the new budget is 560
blocks.notes: Custom field and project template persistence now live in workspaceConfigRepository. repositories.ts is 524 lines and remains the root datasource composition. Stop condition: do not split more persistence areas until a business feature or proven risk requires it.

blocks.problem: Large integration and smoke specs are valuable but hard to localize when failures happen.
blocks.notes: REF-006A extracted Playwright smoke helpers without weakening assertions; remaining future split into multiple specs is optional once flows grow further.

blocks.problem: The smoke spec embedded login/logout and responsive navigation assertions inline, making failures harder to localize.
tests_before: pnpm test:e2e:smoke failed after importing the future helper because smokeHelpers did not exist
blocks.notes: Login/logout/dashboard readiness and responsive navigation assertions now have named helper functions. Assertions were moved, not removed.

blocks.problem: Local generated artifacts and an untracked screenshot are present in the worktree; generated output can obscure refactor diffs.
blocks.notes: No deletion in this refactor closure. The only visible untracked artifact is phase2-2-users-crud.png and it may be user-owned.

blocks.problem: Requested baseline commands npm run lint, npm run test:unit and npm run test:integration are absent.
tests_before: npm run lint exits 1: missing script
npm run test:unit exits 1: missing script
npm run test:integration exits 1: missing script
tests_after: Decision needed before adding new script semantics
blocks.notes: No new script semantics added in this refactor closure. Current canonical checks are pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm test:db, web build and smoke.

blocks.problem: Search did not find Bitrix-specific leakage in active core code, but docs intentionally preserve BR2 as reference/anti-pattern context.
tests_after: Repeat search when adding project-control domain modules
blocks.notes: Keep monitoring as new resource/KPI/control-surface modules appear.

blocks.problem: Documentation and tests needed to reflect the actual Tailwind CSS v4/shadcn scaffold instead of the older shadcn-like-only baseline.
tests_before: apps/web/src/shadcnFoundation.test.ts already covered most scaffold files but did not explicitly guard the PostCSS bridge
blocks.notes: No second scaffold installation was needed. The existing scaffold is now guarded by tests including @tailwindcss/postcss.

blocks.problem: State-changing CRM/intake use cases lived directly inside HTTP route handlers, mixing permissions, transactions, domain checks and audit with body parsing and response mapping.
tests_before: pnpm vitest run apps/api/src/projectIntakeService.test.ts failed because ./projectIntakeService did not exist
pnpm vitest run apps/web/src/repositoryHealth.test.ts failed after modularization guardrail because projectIntakeService.ts had 729 lines with a 120-line budget
tests_after: pnpm vitest run apps/api/src/projectIntakeService.test.ts apps/api/src/app.test.ts apps/api/src/projectIntakeParsers.test.ts
blocks.notes: projectIntakeService.ts is now a thin facade. Create/stage/feasibility/activate commands, authorization, audit, link resolving and feasibility assessment live in focused modules under projectIntakeService/. Routes remain responsible for session, JSON body parsing and HTTP response mapping. ProjectDraft lifecycle is closed by REF-012 as Project.status=draft.

blocks.problem: Canonical docs require ProjectDraft before active project, while current activation creates an active project directly from an opportunity.
blocks.expected_behavior_change: yes, activation now passes through Project status draft before active while preserving the existing Phase 3 endpoint contract
tests_before: Architecture review found direct active project creation in current activation flow
pnpm vitest run --config vitest.db.config.ts packages/persistence/src/repositories.db.test.ts failed because createProjectDraftFromOpportunity did not exist
blocks.notes: Decision: ProjectDraft is Project.status=draft, not a separate aggregate. Draft has activatedAt=null, is hidden from /api/workspace/projects and does not reserve capacity. Governed activation transitions draft to active, sets activatedAt, converts the source opportunity and writes audit beforeState draft -> afterState active.

blocks.problem: ApiTenantDataSource is a broad kitchen-sink port spanning auth, users, CRM, project intake, workspace config, audit and transactions.
tests_before: Typecheck and route/db tests before each context-specific split
tests_after: Typecheck and targeted route/db tests after each context-specific split
blocks.notes: Split only with concrete business slices into context-specific ports such as CrmIntakeRepository, ProjectIntakeRepository, ResourcePlanningRepository, AuditWriter and TransactionRunner.

blocks.problem: Opportunity stores reference ids and snapshot labels, while UI resolves current labels; the API contract does not yet name historical snapshots distinctly.
tests_after: DTO/schema tests after snapshot/current label contract is formalized
blocks.notes: Prefer explicit snapshot fields or a DTO that separates currentLabels from snapshotLabels.

blocks.problem: Feasibility currently uses position demand and active user counts directly; this is a valid intake seed but not the final resource matrix boundary.
tests_before: packages/domain/src/projectIntake.test.ts and app.db resource feasibility tests
tests_after: Provider-level resource availability and reservation tests before Phase 4 matrix work
blocks.notes: Introduce ResourceAvailabilityProvider or equivalent before building BR2-like resource matrix, reservations and load buckets.

blocks.problem: WorkspaceData aggregates most workspace server state and is passed through route rendering; future heavy pages should not keep expanding the central object.
tests_before: Existing workspaceData, routes and smoke tests
tests_after: Feature-specific query hook tests when adding Gantt/resource/KPI/control pages
blocks.notes: Keep shell data for session/navigation/audit preview. New project-control pages should own their query bundles through feature-specific hooks.
